title.ko: 도로의 부대설비(附帶設備)의 설치 또는 플랫폼, 헬리콥터의 착륙대(着陸臺), 표시(標示), 방설책(防雪柵) 또는 이와 유사한 것의 건설과 같은 부대작업(附帶作業)
title.en: ADDITIONAL WORK, SUCH AS EQUIPPING ROADS OR THE CONSTRUCTION OF PLATFORMS, HELICOPTER LANDING STAGES, SIGNS, SNOW FENCES, OR THE LIKE

definition.ko: 도로 또는 철도용의 장치 E01F1/00, E01F5/00 ~ E01F8/00 도로 사용을 용이하게 하기 위한 설비 E01F9/00 ~ E01F15/00 헬리콥터 착륙대 E01F3/00

title.ko: 플랫폼 또는 안전 지대의 건설(철도용 플랫폼의 일반적 배열 B61B)
title.en: Arrangement or construction of additional equipment for roads or railways; Landing stages for helicopters

title.ko: 플랫폼 또는 안전 지대의 건설(철도용 플랫폼의 일반적 배열 B61B)
title.en: Construction of platforms or refuge islands (general arrangement of railway platforms B61B)

title.ko: 헬리콥터의 착륙대, 예. 건물의 상부에 설치된 것 (비행장의 레이아웃 B64F; 특수 목적용의 건물 또는 유사한 구조물 E04H)
title.en: Landing stages for helicopters, e.g. located above buildings (layout of airfields B64F;buildings or like structures for special purposes E04H)

title.ko: 도로의 보조기층(補助基層) 또는 철도의 도상(道床)의 도랑, 암거(暗渠) 또는 도관(導管)에 의한 배수(지하배수 E02D; 하수용의 도관(導管) E03F)
title.en: Draining the sub-base of roads or ballastway of railways by trenches, culverts, or conduits (underground drainage E02D;conduits for sewerage E03F)

title.ko: 눈(雪), 비사(飛沙), 횡풍(橫風), 눈사태,산사태, 낙석(落石)에 대한 방호 장치(도로를 위한 상설 설치된 가열 또는 송풍 장치 E01C 11/26); 눈부심 방지장치
title.en: Devices affording protection against snow, sand drifts, side-wind effects, snowslides, avalanches or falling rocks (permanently installed heating or blowing devices for roads E01C0011260000); Anti-dazzle arrangements

title.ko: 방설책(防雪柵) 또는 유사한 장치, 예. 비사(飛沙) 또는 횡풍(橫風)에 대한 방호 장치(책(柵) 일반 E04H 17/00)
title.en: Snow fences or similar devices, e.g. devices affording protection against sand drifts or side-wind effects (fences in general E04H0017000000)

title.ko: 눈사태, 산사태, 낙석(落石)의 방호 장치, 예. 눈사태 방호 구조물, 방호 통로(사면의 안정 E02D 17/20; 지붕의 눈멈춤 E04D 13/10)
title.en: Devices affording protection against snowslides, avalanches or falling rocks, e.g. avalanche preventing structures, galleries (securing of slopes E02D0017200000;roof snow-traps E04D0013100000)

title.ko: 눈부심 방지 장치(E01F 8/00이 우선)
title.en: Anti-dazzle arrangements (E01F0008000000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 도로 또는 철도에서 대기중으로 전파되는 소음(騷音)을 흡수 또는 반사하는 장치(비행기 소음을 감소시키기 위해 지상에 설치된 것 B64F 1/26; 소음을 흡수 또는 반사 하는 건축물의 건설 일반 또는 건축물의 소음 흡수 또는 반사 E04B 1/74)
title.en: Arrangements for absorbing or reflecting air transmitted noise from road or railway traffic (ground installations for reducing aircraft noise B64F0001260000;general building constructions for absorbing or reflecting noise, noise absorption or reflection for buildings E04B0001740000)

title.ko: 초목 유지 또는 묘목수용을 위해 특히 적합한 것(묘목 재배용 용기 A01G 9/02; 사면 또는 경사면의 안정 E02D 17/20; 옹벽 또는 보호벽 E02D 29/02)
title.en: specially adapted for sustaining vegetation or for accommodating plants (receptacles for cultivation of plants A01G0009020000;securing slopes or inclines E02D0017200000;retaining or protecting walls E02D0029020000)

title.ko: 도로 표식(標識) 또는 교통 신호의 배치; 주의를 강요하기 위한 장치 (교통을 차단 또는 제한하기 위한 것 E01F 13/00)
title.en: Arrangements for facilitating the use of roads

title.ko: 도로 표식(標識) 또는 교통 신호의 배치; 주의를 강요하기 위한 장치 (교통을 차단 또는 제한하기 위한 것 E01F 13/00)
title.en: Arrangement of road signs or traffic signals; Arrangements for enforcing caution (for obstructing or restricting traffic E01F0013000000)
Use of light guides, e.g. fibre-optic devices

title.ko: 가시적인 수단에 의한 것 이외의 송신기 또는 수신기와 상호 작용하는 장치, 예. 레이더 반사기 또는 무선 송신기를 이용하는 것 (E01F 11/00 우선)
title.en: Arrangements interacting with transmitters or receivers otherwise than by visible means, e.g. using radar reflectors or radio transmitters (E01F0011000000 takes precedence)
Arrangements responsive to adverse atmospheric conditions, e.g. to signal icy roads or to automatically illuminate in fog; Arrangements characterised by heating or drying means

title.ko: 노면 표식; 도로 사용자에게 경보하기 위해 특별히 적합한 연석 또는 도로 가장자리 (차량의 방향을 바꾸기 위한 것 E01F 15/00 )
title.en: Road surface markings; Kerbs or road edgings, specially adapted for alerting road users (for redirecting vehicles E01F0015000000)
characterised by the road surface marking material, e.g. comprising additives for improving friction or reflectivity; Methods of forming, installing or applying markings in, on or to road surfaces
Preformed road surface markings, e.g. of sheet material; Methods of applying preformed markings
formed in situ, e.g. by painting, by casting into the road surface or by deforming the road surface
Reflecting elements specially adapted for incorporation in or application to road surface markings
specially adapted for signalling by sound or vibrations, e.g. rumble strips; specially adapted for enforcing reduced speed, e.g. speed bumps
Kerbs or road edgings specially adapted for alerting road users
Kerbs
illuminated
Low discrete bodies, e.g. marking blocks, studs or flexible vehicle-striking members
illuminated
having deflectable or displaceable parts
displaceable vertically under load, e.g. in combination with rotation
Traffic lines
illuminated
Lane delineators for physically separating traffic lanes and discouraging but not preventing crossing
movable for reuse at different locations

title.ko: 수직 몸체, 예. 표시 기둥 또는 보호주(保護柱 ,bollards); 도로표지용 지지물
title.en: Upright bodies, e.g. marker posts or bollards; Supports for road signs
specially adapted for particular signalling purposes, e.g. for indicating curves, road works or pedestrian crossings
for guiding, warning or controlling traffic, e.g. delineator posts or milestones
for indicating freshly applied road surface markings, e.g. straddling lines
illuminated
with reflectors; with means for keeping reflectors clean

title.ko: 형태 또는 구조적 특징에 의해 특징지워진 것, 예. 변위 또는 변형을 가능하게 하기 위한 것
title.en: characterised by form or by structural features, e.g. for enabling displacement or deflection
self-righting after deflection or displacement
specially adapted for breaking, disengaging, collapsing or permanently deforming when deflected or displaced, e.g. by vehicle impact
by shearing or tearing, e.g. having weakened zones
by connection of stud-and-socket type, e.g. spring-loaded
friction-coupled

title.ko: 확장식, 절첩식 또는 피봇 가능한 것 (E01F 9/627, E01F 9/631 우선 )
title.en: extensible, collapsible or pivotable (E01F0009627000, E01F0009631000 take precedence)

title.ko: 회전, 스윙 또는 조절 가능한 표식 또는 신호를 갖는 것 (E01F 9/646 우선 )
title.en: with rotatable, swingable or adjustable signs or signals (E01F0009646000 takes precedence)
in the form of three-dimensional [3D] bodies, e.g. cones; capable of assuming 3D form, e.g. by inflation or erection to form a geometric body
characterised by means for fixing
mounted on vehicles, e.g. service vehicles; Warning vehicles travelling along with road-maintenance, e.g. remotely controlled
for fastening to safety barriers or the like
for holding sign posts or the like
the sign posts being removable without tools, e.g. of stud-and-socket type
the sign posts being fastened by removable means, e.g. screws or bolts
Subsoil means, e.g. foundations
Free-standing bodies
Portable base members therefor
Overhead structures, e.g. gantries; Foundation means specially adapted therefor
Storing, transporting, placing or retrieving portable devices

title.ko: 포장 표면 또는 다른 노면에의 패드(pad) 또는 감지 장치의 매설(埋設)(감압소자(減壓素子) G01L; 교통 제어 방식 G08G)
title.en: Embedding pads or other sensitive devices in paving or other road surfaces (pressure-sensitive elements G01L;traffic control systems G08G)

title.ko: 교통을 방해 또는 제한하는 장치, 예. 게이트, 바리게이트(철도 건널목용 B61L)
title.en: Arrangements for obstructing or restricting traffic, e.g. gates, barricades (for railway crossings B61L)
free-standing
movable to allow or prevent passage
by swinging into open position about a horizontal axis parallel to the road direction, i.e. swinging gates
by swinging into closed position about a transverse axis situated in the road surface, e.g. tiltable sections of the road surface, tiltable parking posts
Vehicle barriers specially adapted for allowing passage in one direction only
for forcibly arresting or disabling vehicles, e.g. spiked mats

title.ko: 길을 잘못 든 차량을 감속, 방향 전환 또는 정지시키게 하는 안전 설비, 예. 안내 지주, 볼라드(bollard); 차량 충돌로 인한 길가 구조물의 손상을 감소시키기 위한 장치 (통행 막이 또는 그와 유사한 것에 표지나 신호를 고정시키기 위한 설비 E01F9/669; 차량을 강제로 정지시키기 위한 것 E01F13/00)
title.en: Safety arrangements for slowing, redirecting or stopping errant vehicles, e.g. guard posts or bollards; Arrangements for reducing damage to roadside structures due to vehicular impact (arrangements for fastening signs or signals to safety barriers or the like E01F0009669000;for forcibly arresting vehicles E01F0013000000)

title.ko: 도로 또는 차선사이에 연장된 연속 통행 막이 (횡단 차선 분리기 E01F9/588)
title.en: Continuous barriers extending along roads or between traffic lanes (crossable-lane separators E01F0009588000)

title.ko: 주로 긴 빔 또는 강성 스트립으로 만들어진 것 (E01F15/10, E01F15/12가 우선)
title.en: essentially made of longitudinal beams or rigid strips (E01F0015100000, E01F0015120000 take precedence)

title.ko: 주로 케이블, 망 또는 그와 유사한 것으로 만들어진 것(E01F 15/10, E01F 15/12가 우선; 낙석에 대한 보호망 E01F 7/04; 비행기의 착륙 제동 장치 B64F 1/02)
title.en: essentially made of cables, nettings or the like (E01F0015100000, E01F0015120000 take precedence;protection against falling rocks E01F0007040000;arresting gear for aircraft B64F0001020000)

title.ko: 주로 벽 또는 벽과 유사한 요소로 만들어진 것(E01F 15/10, E01F 15/12가 우선)
title.en: essentially made of walls or wall-like elements (E01F0015100000, E01F0015120000 take precedence)
portable, e.g. for temporary use
and having means for providing occasional passage, e.g. for emergency vehicles
specially adapted for local protection, e.g. for bridge piers, for traffic islands
